recommendations.title: The Punisher
recommendations.overview: When undercover FBI agent Frank Castle's wife and son are slaughtered, he becomes 'the Punisher' -- a ruthless vigilante willing to go to any length to avenge his family.

recommendations.title: Outcast
recommendations.overview: A mysterious warrior teams up with the daughter and son of a deposed Chinese Emperor to defeat their cruel brother, who seeks their deaths.

recommendations.title: Phineas and Ferb: Star Wars
recommendations.genres: Animation, Comedy, Family, Science Fiction, Adventure, TV Movie, Action

recommendations.overview: A possessed Ninja doll teams up with a teenage boy to avenge the murder of a poor child factory worker.

recommendations.title: K.O.
recommendations.overview: A former fighter must find the missing son of an opponent he accidentally killed years ago, taking on a brutally violent crime gang in Marseille.

recommendations.title: Blade II
recommendations.overview: Blade forms an uneasy alliance with the vampire council in order to combat the Reapers, who are feeding on vampires.
